'''jabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoogeographically|zoogeographically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoogeographically|zoogeographically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jabate|jabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jabatesher|jabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jabatesherĂ«m|jabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jabatero|jabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jabateshĂ«|jabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jabateshĂ«m|jabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijabatero|gokijabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijabateshĂ«|gokijabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijabateshĂ«m|gokijabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojabankerom|gojabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojabankeshĂ«|gojabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojabankeshĂ«m|gojabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojabankeya|gojabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jabaterom|jabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jabatemu|jabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jabateya|jabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijabaterom|gokijabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijabatemu|gokijabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijabateya|gokijabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jababate|jababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jababatesher|jababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jababatesherĂ«m|jababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jababatero|jababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jababateshĂ«|jababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jababateshĂ«m|jababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijababatero|gokijababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijababateshĂ«|gokijababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijababateshĂ«m|gokijababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojababankerom|gojababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojababankeshĂ«|gojababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojababankeshĂ«m|gojababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojababankeya|gojababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jababaterom|jababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jababatemu|jababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jababateya|jababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijababaterom|gokijababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijababatemu|gokijababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijababateya|gokijababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠbĂŠte|jĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠbĂŠtesher|jĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠbĂŠtero|jĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠbĂŠtero|gokijĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠbĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠbĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠbĂŠterom|jĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠbĂŠtemu|jĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠbĂŠteya|jĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠbĂŠterom|gokijĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠbĂŠteya|gokijĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafbafte|jafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafbaftesher|jafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafbaftesherĂ«m|jafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafbaftero|jafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafbafteshĂ«|jafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafbafteshĂ«m|jafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafbaftero|gokijafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafbafteshĂ«|gokijafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafbafteshĂ«m|gokijafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafbafnkerom|gojafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafbafnkeshĂ«|gojafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafbafnkeshĂ«m|gojafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafbafnkeya|gojafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafbafterom|jafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafbaftemu|jafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafbafteya|jafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafbafterom|gokijafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafbaftemu|gokijafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafbafteya|gokijafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
